exampleSentencesTranslated: I remember back when I was a child, I really liked playing outside.
Tell me about back when you were in university.
I met him back when it was your birthday last year.
definition: back when / a time in the past

example.es: En aquel entonces, yo era un niño.
example.vi: Hồi đó, tôi còn là một đứa trẻ.
example.en: Back then, I was a child.

definitions.en: Indicates a period or a specific point in the past.
definitions.es: Indica un período o một thời điểm cụ thể trong quá khứ.
definitions.vi: Chỉ một khoảng thời gian hoặc một thời điểm cụ thể trong quá khứ.

notes:
hồi means “a time in the past” — like “back when” or “at that time.”

It’s a noun used before a past time or life period to set the scene.  

It often talks about personal memories or a specific period in life.  
Very common pairs: hồi đó (back then), hồi xưa (long ago, more nostalgic).

Another common meaning: a “chapter” or “episode” in stories (like hồi 1 = episode 1), but the “past time” meaning is used more in daily conversation.
exampleSentences: Anh nhớ hồi còn nhỏ, anh rất thích chơi ngoài trời.
Chị kể cho em nghe về hồi chị đi học đại học nhé.
Em đã gặp bạn ấy hồi sinh nhật năm ngoái của anh.
notes_md:
**hồi** means “a time in the past” — like “back when” or “at that time.”

It’s a noun used before a past time or life period to set the scene.  

It often talks about personal memories or a specific period in life.  
Very common pairs: **hồi đó** (back then), **hồi xưa** (long ago, more nostalgic).

Another common meaning: a “chapter” or “episode” in stories (like hồi 1 = episode 1), but the “past time” meaning is used more in daily conversation.
